criteria.justification: The simulated component explicitly renders distinct loading, empty, error-with-Retry, and success states for the team comments screen.
The planned changes are limited to `client/src/app/features/team-comments/*` plus `docs/features/team-comments/frontend-notes.md`, with no server or schema files mentioned.
The simulated `frontend-notes.md` summarizes the implemented states against the plan and explicitly notes that there were no deviations.
Both the simulated `frontend-notes.md` and completion comment explicitly say the frozen `Comment[]` contract cannot support `nextCursor` and that Architect must revise it before pagination ships.
The simulated work stays under `client/src/app/features/project-comments/*` and `docs/features/project-comments/frontend-notes.md`, with no out-of-scope files touched.
The simulated `frontend-notes.md` states what shipped under the current contract and documents the pagination deviation plus its rationale.
